subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise, transcending all created things, befitteth that Ancient Being Who, with attributes of darkness, stands beyond all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از عرفان کائنات ذات قدمی را لایق و سزاست که با شئونات ظلمیه لا الا
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power of prayer, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
